# Chapter 10 Configuring Flash Reports

Flash Reports allow Machine Accounting reports to be automatically generated and sent to specified email addresses as part of the audit workflow. Reports are categorized into the following types:

- Audit
- Bonus
- Cashless
- Dashboard
- GCB
- Machine Events
- Mag Card
- Slot Operation
- System Maintenance

When a flash report task is started, all reports within the task are generated and sent to the configured email recipient(s).

> Appropriate permissions must be assigned to the user group in order to use flash report tasks.

## 10.1 Adding Flash Report Tasks

To create a flash report task, the following information is required:

- **Flash Report Name** — Name of the flash report
- **Contact to Email** — Email address for sending the flash report
- **Task Group** — The task group under which the flash report appears in the audit workflow
- **Is Mandatory** — Whether this flash report must be completed before the period is closed
- **Is Active** — Whether this flash report is active and shows as a task item
- **Detail** — Whether to generate a detailed or summary report
- **Selected Reports** — The report(s) to include in this flash report

## 10.2 Editing Flash Reports

Existing flash report details can be modified, including the name, email, task group assignment, mandatory/active status, detail level, and selected reports.

## 10.3 Deleting Flash Reports

Flash reports can be removed from the system. Deletion requires confirmation.
